theme_and_archetype.rationale: High-density data cockpit for algo traders. Requires maximum legibility, clear semantic coloring (gains/losses), and a highly technical 'athletic/precision' feel. Rejects standard SaaS purple gradients and Bloomberg orange.

fonts.name: Barlow Condensed
fonts.usage: Massive KPI numbers and primary Hero headings

fonts.name: Chivo
fonts.usage: Section headings, Widget titles, Card headers

fonts.name: IBM Plex Sans
fonts.usage: Body text, labels, general UI elements

fonts.name: JetBrains Mono
fonts.usage: Data tables, prices, code/DSL viewer, specific numeric metrics

rules.headings: Tracking tight, uppercase overlines. High contrast.
rules.numbers: Always use tabular nums (font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums) or JetBrains Mono.

colors.rules: Layered darkness. No pure black. Strict restraint on color; use it purely for state/meaning (gains/losses/alerts).

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Solid backgrounds. Sharp corners (`rounded-sm` max). No soft shadows, rely on 1px borders.
spacing_and_layout.hierarchy: Top-left for primary KPIs (P&L, Margin). Progressive disclosure for secondary data.
spacing_and_layout.density: High density. Minimize padding inside data tables (`p-2` or `p-3`). Generous padding around major structural sections (`p-6`).

components.cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border. No drop shadow. Hover state elevates slightly with border color darkening.
components.tables: Dense. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Monospace font for digits. Sticky headers for scrolling.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`). High contrast text on hover. Primary CTA is Stark White (#f4f4f5) with black text.
components.charts: Recharts. Grid lines at 10% opacity. Neon-accent data lines. Avoid filled area charts unless gradient is 10% opacity max.
components.heatmaps: Option Writers' Trap Detection uses a discrete 5-step color scale from Neutral Surface (#18181b) to Warning Amber (#F59E0B) to Red (#EF4444).
components.navigation: Sticky top/side. Solid background. Hard border-bottom/right. No glassmorphism in dashboard context.
components.forms: Inputs have 1px border. Focus state must have high-contrast ring.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="kill-switch-button"`).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Explicit text and border color changes. e.g. `hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white`.
motion_and_interactions.data_updates: KPIs should flash subtle green/red background or text when real-time ticks update.

icons.style: Regular or Bold (depending on scale). Keep stroke width consistent. Used heavily in dense dashboards.

auth_background.description: Abstract dark topographic map with glowing grid lines. Use as full-page background for Login/Register screens with an overlay of bg-zinc-950/80.

hero_texture.description: Dark matte metal texture. Use as a subtle background layer for the top 'cockpit' KPI panel or AI Strategy Builder header, mixed with low opacity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Tailwind CSS with standard zinc palette configuration.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the primary grid layout, employing 'display: grid' extensively.
Integrate Shadcn components (tables, dialogs, inputs) but strip border radii to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none'.
Ensure all interactive elements and forms include 'data-testid' for testing.
Do NOT use Recharts if D3 is preferred for complex quant visualisations, but for standard lines/bars use Recharts. Given the brief, Recharts is sufficient for Equity curves and Drawdowns.
Implement Option Writers Trap Detection Heatmap using pure Tailwind grid/divs with varying opacity of background color.
All components must be built as .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard React JavaScript.
Enforce APCA contrast ratios. Avoid 'vibrating' text colors.
